prompt: Add a circular arrow around the Venn diagram to indicate continuous improvement in all areas.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays a four-circle Venn diagram. Add a single, continuous circular arrow around the perimeter of the entire Venn diagram, positioned outside the existing circles. The arrow should clearly indicate a cyclical flow, symbolizing continuous improvement across all elements of the diagram.
objects: Overlapping regions of the Venn diagram
Arrow positioned around the perimeter of the Venn diagram, outside the existing circles
